title: C Programming - Beginner Level Question Paper

questions.q: What is C programming language?
Name two areas where C is widely used.
What is the purpose of #include <stdio.h>?
What is a variable in C?
Write any two data types in C.
What is the difference between = and == ?
What is printf used for?
Define loop in programming.
What is an infinite loop?
What is the use of break statement?
Explain the structure of a basic C program with example.
Explain different data types in C with examples.
Explain arithmetic and logical operators with examples.
Differentiate between while, do-while, and for loop.
Explain type conversion in C (implicit and explicit).
Explain loop control statements (break and continue) with examples.
Explain operator precedence and expression evaluation in C with examples.
Describe formatted input and output in C using scanf and printf.
Write a C program to print multiplication table of a number.
Write a C program to check whether a number is prime or not.
Write a C program to find factorial of a number using loop.
Create a menu-driven calculator using loops and switch case to perform addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
